items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Architecting high-performance full-stack solutions with a focus on interactive 3D interfaces. Bridging the gap between creative design and robust engineering using React, Three.js, and modern PHP/WordPress ecosystems.

items.title: Web Applications Developer
items.description: Enginneering modern web applications with a focus on UI optimization and responsive architecture. Implemented agile workflows to deliver high-quality frontend experiences and scalable code structures.

items.title: Logistics Operations Analyst
items.description: Leveraged deep analytical skills to optimize complex logistics operations. Transitioned a solid foundation in data analysis and systematic problem-solving into efficient software engineering.

items.title: Store Manager
items.description: Spearheaded retail operations for telecommunications, honing leadership and user-centric problem-solving. Developed a keen eye for customer needs that now informs intuitive interface design.

items.title: Commercial Supervisor
items.description: Managed critical commercial operations in a high-stakes aeronautical environment. Mastered team coordination and operational precision, essential for managing complex codebases.

items.title: Quality Control Technician
items.description: Established a rigorous technical mindset through quality control. Developed an uncompromising attention to detail and a systematic approach to technical excellence from the start.
